The Eswaran Brothers Group has been trading in tea since 1963. Now with customers in over 50 countries,
the company is focused on providing a total tea solution worldwide,
We are looking for a tech-savvy and self-motivated IT Systems Support Intern to join our IT team, with a primary
focus on supporting our Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems. This internship offers' hands-on experience
in a fast-paced environment, where you'll assist in maintaining and troubleshooting our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
ERP platform, alongside general system support. Ideal for a proactive leamer eager to dive into ERP technologies,
this role will involve resolvin user queries, optimizing system performance,
and integrating tools like Microsoft Office 365.
If you're passionate about technology and enjoy self-directed learning, this is your chance to build practical skills
in enterprise IT systems. \ \ \ ‘ (
=
Key Responsibilities : A rN N\A 4 VAS
* Provide daily support for IT systems inquiries, with an emphasis on ERP-related issues in SAP S/4HANA
Public Cloud (e.g., module troubleshooting, data queries, user access).
+ Troubleshoot Office 365 applications (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint) and their integration with
ERP systems. \\ Wr”
+ Diagnose and resolve system-related problems on Windows and macOS, including software conflicts,
updates, and performance optimization.
+ Conduct site visits to branch offices or Strategic Business Units (SBUs) for on-site ERP/system audits, user
training, and issue resolution.
+ Document support activities, resolutions, and system updates in ticketing systems.
+ Escalate complex ERP or system issues to senior team members and follow up on solutions.
+ Participate in self-learning initiatives to stay updated on SAP S/4HANA features and emerging IT trends.
Qualifications & Skills :
+ Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree/diptoma in Information Technology, Computer Science, +
+ Business Information Systems, or a related field.
+ Tech-savvy with a strong interest in enterprise systems; basic famitiarity with ERP concepts (SAP S/4HANA
experience is a plus but not required),
+ Proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 applications and troubleshooting skills for common issues.
+ Solid understanding of operating systems (Windows and macOS) and basic networking.
+ Excellent problem-solving abilities with a logical approach to diagnosing system and ERP challenges.
+ Demonstrated self-learning ability, such as through online courses, personal projects, or certifications (e.g.,
SAP or Microsoft-related).
* Strong communication skills to explain technical concepts to non-technical users.
+ Proactive mindset, organizational skills, and wilingness to work independently or under supervision,
What We Offer :
+ Real-world exposure to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and enterprise IT support.
+ Mentorship from experienced IT professionals to foster your self-learning and growth.
+ Opportunities to work with cutting-edge tools like ERP integrations and 0365 ecosystems.
+ Potential for future full-time roles based on performance.
A self-motivated person, with good communication skills and a proven track record for meeting deadlines
with a positive altitude, eager to learn and adapt to new environments

VACANCIES

Tropical Fresh is in the business of fresh fruits and vegetables. We
have an export operation in Sapugaskanda, Biyagama and as well as a
sales outlet in Colombo 07 for fresh fruits, vegetables, juices and
snacks. We need young and dynamic finance personnel to strengthen
the finance division.

JUNIOR FINANCE EXECUTIVE

We need young finance professional to handle the day to day
accounting transactions in the accounting system, and inventory
control management system of the retail sales outlet. Partly qualified
in CIMA/AAT/CA with a minimum, of 2'years experience needed.
Need to have a good knowledge ‘in’ excel, and “other ‘accounting
a\ QWwye \ow

INTERNAL AUDIT EXECUTIVE

We need young finance professional to audit the accounting
transactions, adherence to internal controls and inventory
reconciliation of the retail sales outlets on a weekly basis. Partly
qualified in CIMA/AAT/CA with a minimum of 2 years audit
experience is needed. Need to have a good knowledge in excel and
other accounting software.

TRAINEE FINANCE EXECUTIVE

We need a trainee executive to support recording of the day to day
accounting transactions of the retail outlets and export pack house
operation.. Partly qualified in CIMA/AAT/CA with a minimum of 1
year experience needed. Preference will be given to candidates with
audit firm experience.

Email your CV to hr@tropicalfresh.lk

YOUR PATHWAY TO A SUCCESSFUL CAREER IN FINANCIAL SECTOR
People’s Bank, as Sri Lanka's leading State Commercial Bank and arecognized leader in digital banking,
invite high-potential, driven, and responsible youth with a passion for performance and leadership to
join us. If you have the caliber to lead and the drive to excel, come grow with People’s Bank.
QUALIFICATIONS AND CRITERIA
@ = Candidate should be a citizen of Sri Lanka
ACADEMIC/PROFESSIONAL QUALIFICATIONS
a) A graduate of a local or foreign University recognized by University Grants Commission of Sri

Lanka with at least 2nd class Upper division/ First Class degree or Grade Point Average (GPA}
with a minimum of 35 out of a maximum of 4.0 points obtained in any of the following subjects/
disciplines:

Economics, Statistics, Mathematics, Accounting, Banking, Finance, Commerce, Business
Administration, Management {Public/Financial/Accountancy/Business), Marketing, Human
Resource, Engineering, Computer Science, ICT, Law, Intemational Business, Valuation, Agriculture,
Physical Science or any other discipline related to Banking & Finance.

oR

b} — Adegree together with Post graduate qualification at Master's or higher level, obtained from a
Jocal or foreign University recognized by the University Grants Commission of Sri Lanka, in any
of the above subjects/disciplines mentioned in para {a)

oR

<) Diploma in Banking and Finance (DBF} or Diploma in Applied Banking and Finance (DABF}
qualification of the Institute of Bankers of Sri Lanka (IBSL} or Diploma in Banking of the Chartered
Institute of Bankers - UK (CIB) together with a degree from a local or foreign university recognized
by the University Grants Commission of Sri Lanka relating to the abovernentioned disciplines in
para {a}

oR

4} Full Qualification of one of the following professional bodies together with a degree from a local
or foreign university recognized by the University Grants Cornmission of Sri Lanka relating to the
abovernentioned disciplines in para (a) \ ‘

The Institute of Chartered Accountants of Sri Lanka {ICA-SL}
The Association of Chartered Centified Accountants (ACCA-UI}
The Chartered Financial Analyst Programme of the CFA Institute (CFA-USA}
The Chartered Institute of Management Accountants of UIC (CIMA-UI<)
© The Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICA-EW}
© The Institute of Certified Management Accountants of Sri Lanka (CMA-SL}
The Chartered Institute of Marketing (CIM-UIX)
Vy

OTHER ATTRIBUTES

@ Strong professional competence, including commitment to organizational objectives, adaptability in
dynamic work environments, leadership capability, problem-solving skills, and effective teamwork.

. High communication, technical, and personal readiness, including strong computer literacy,
proficiency in English and Sinhala or Tamil, and being physically and mentally fit to effectively
discharge assigned duties.

AGE

@ = Ageshould be not less than 18 years and below 28 years as at dosing date of Applications.

{Candidate shall be treated as having satisfied the qualifications relating to the age if his/her birthday
falls on or before 03.03.2008 and on or after 04031998}

METHOD OF SELECTION

@ Candidates who are reuited under this scheme will be referred to a formal and comprehensive
training covering all the aspects of banking on a two-year contract basis. Those who complete
the period satisfactorily will be considered to be absorbed in the permanent cadre to the grade of
Assistant Manager.

@ = The selection is made subject to an onsite supervised written examination conducted by the
Open University of Sri Lanka where selections are made subsequent to an interview conducted
by the Bank for the shortlisted candidates.

@ The selection is made on order of merit based on the vacancies identified.

@ The onsite supervised written examination will consist of 2 papers. The paper! shall be an English
Language paper in English medium and the paper Il shall be in a medium of preference of the
candidate. However, the candidate can select only one medium for the paper land oncea medium
is selected the candidate shall not be allowed to change the medium under any circumstances,
The outline of the examination is as Follows;

Paper! | Language paper to test the working knowledge of English | English
and the organization of thoughts and knowledge
Papert! | a) Analytical SRill/IQ
b} Psychometric test Sinhala / English / Tamil

@ The onsite supervised written examination shall be conducted in examination centers located in
Colombo.

@ Despite the candidate has passed the examination if he/she does not meet the minimum
eligibility criteria determined by the bank as at closing date of the applications or submission
of false/incorrect information, he/she shall be rejected at any stage of the recruitment without
any further notice. If any applicant fails to produce the documentary evidence to prove the above
required eligibility criteria at the time of verification of certificates, his/her application will be
rejected immediately.

@ The selected candidates should be willing to work in any part of the country in line with Bank
requirements. The placement shall be decided at the discretion of the Management of the Bank.

®@ ~— Amonthly allowance of Rs. 100,000 will be paid during the period.

APPLICATIONS

Relevant application is published on the website of the Open University of Sri Lanka on https://ou.ac

.[k/peoplesbank-mt/ and on People’s Bank website under “Careers” Tab. The applications can only

be submitted online before the closing date of applications.

The closing date of applications is 03.03.2026. Applications submitted by any method other than

this online procedure will not be accepted under any circumstances.

The instructions with regard to the submission of applications are indicated on the website of the Open

University of Sri Lanka. Itis the responsibility of the applicant to fill the application having carefully read

the said instructions.

All applications will be treated in strict confidentiality and any form of canvassing will be regarded as a

disqualification. All incomplete and Non - complying applications will be rejected. The Bank retains the

right to call only the short listed candidates.

The Bank reserves the right to decide the number of vacancies, postponement or cancellation of

recruitment or on any other information not included in the advertisement.

The bank ensures the protection of your personal data’s privacy and confidentiality in full compliance

with its established Information Security Policy. OReIo
